name: ConstructConnect Construction Data & Bidding API
what_it_does: ConstructConnect REST API for construction project data, bidding management, and contractor intelligence. Enables AI agents to manage construction project lead identification and opportunity tracking for contractor business development, handle bid invitation management and subcontractor solicitation for GC procurement, access construction project data and specifications for pre-bid analysis, retrieve contractor and subcontractor contact database for project solicitation, manage plan room and document distribution for bid package management, handle bid submission and tracking for procurement workflow, access construction market data and project analytics for business intelligence, retrieve project owner and developer contact data for construction sales, manage prequalification and subcontractor qualification workflow, and integrate ConstructConnect project data with CRM, estimating, and ERP platforms.
use_cases: Discovering construction leads from business development agents
Soliciting subcontractor bids from procurement agents
Analyzing construction market from intelligence agents
Managing bid packages from project bidding agents
not_for: Construction project management without pre-construction bidding focus
Manufacturing without construction project bidding context
Consumer markets without commercial construction contractor focus
best_when: A contractor, subcontractor, or material supplier wanting to discover construction project opportunities, manage bid solicitations, and track competitive bidding uses ConstructConnect for AI-driven lead generation and procurement.
avoid_when: DATA QUALITY RISK: ConstructConnect project data completeness varies by geography and project type; automated lead scoring based on incomplete project data creates false opportunity prioritization. Subcontractor contact data accuracy varies; automated bid solicitation to stale contacts wastes procurement resources. ConstructConnect acquired multiple platforms (iSqFt, CMD, BuildFax); API may vary by legacy platform.

auth.notes: ConstructConnect uses OAuth 2.0 and API key. Developer portal at developer.constructconnect.com. Webhooks for project data events. REST API with JSON. Blue Ash, Ohio HQ. GTCR private equity. ConstructConnect formed from iSqFt, CMD, and other construction data acquisitions. 350,000+ contractors and subcontractors. Competes with Dodge Data & Analytics and BidClerk for construction project data and bidding.

pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by geography and data tier
pricing.notes: Blue Ash, Ohio. ConstructConnect (GTCR PE). Formed from iSqFt, CMD Group, BuildFax. 350,000+ construction contractors. Competes with Dodge Data & Analytics and BuildingConnected for construction project data and bidding.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per tier

known_agent_gotchas: DATA QUALITY RISK: ConstructConnect project data completeness varies by geography; automated bid opportunity scoring on incomplete data creates false positives in low-coverage markets
Multi-platform legacy — ConstructConnect aggregated iSqFt, CMD, and other platforms; API endpoints may reflect different legacy platforms with varying data quality
Plan document access — construction plan and specification access requires appropriate plan room permissions; automated document download without authorization creates copyright and access issues
Bid solicitation email volume — automated subcontractor bid solicitation to full contact database without targeting creates email deliverability and spam issues
Competitor bid visibility — ConstructConnect bid tabulations are confidential; automated bid comparison data requires post-bid disclosure period and bidder consent
agent_readiness.security_notes: Construction data. SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US/CA. Project and contractor data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Construction data. SOC2. OAuth2. US/CA. Project and contractor data.
